targets.rawSql: SELECT minute AS time, SUM(total_revenue) AS "Revenue (USD)" FROM revenue_by_minute WHERE $__timeFilter(minute) GROUP BY minute ORDER BY minute
SELECT SUM(purchase_count) AS "Purchases" FROM revenue_by_minute WHERE minute >= now() - interval '15 minutes'
SELECT ROUND(SUM(total_revenue), 2) AS "Revenue (USD)" FROM revenue_by_minute WHERE minute >= now() - interval '15 minutes'

SELECT 'Views' AS stage, SUM(views) AS count FROM funnel_by_product UNION ALL SELECT 'Add to Cart', SUM(add_to_cart) FROM funnel_by_product UNION ALL SELECT 'Purchases', SUM(purchases) FROM funnel_by_product ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT product_id AS "Product", views AS "Views", add_to_cart AS "Cart", purchases AS "Purchases", conversion_pct AS "Conv %" FROM funnel_by_product WHERE views > 0 ORDER BY conversion_pct DESC LIMIT 10
